tasks.title: CharacterController with third-person movement
tasks.description: Implement player_controller.gd as CharacterBody3D matching shared/game-engine/rendering/CharacterController.ts. Third-person character with WASD/gamepad movement via Input.get_vector(), sprint (Shift), jump (Space) using move_and_slide(). Load the player character model from bundled Quaternius assets (Vincent-frontFacing or selected avatar) as child MeshInstance3D. Use InputMap actions defined in project.godot. Handle is_on_floor() for ground detection, floor_max_angle for slope limits, and floor_snap_length for step-up. Camera-relative movement direction from camera_manager.

tasks.title: CameraManager with orbit and follow modes
tasks.description: Implement camera_manager.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/CameraManager.ts. Use SpringArm3D + Camera3D for orbit around player with mouse motion (Input.MOUSE_MODE_CAPTURED) and right-stick rotation. Zoom with mouse wheel adjusting SpringArm3D.spring_length. SpringArm3D handles collision avoidance with buildings/terrain automatically. Smooth transitions between exterior camera (far spring_length), interior camera (closer/lower), and dialogue camera (lerp position to face NPC) using Tween.

tasks.title: NPCModularAssembler with Quaternius character parts
tasks.description: Implement npc_modular_assembler.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/NPCModularAssembler.ts and QuaterniusNPCLoader.ts. Assemble NPC characters from modular Quaternius GLTF parts: base body (5+ types by gender/build), hair (100+ styles with gender affinity), outfits (200+ pieces organized by gender/set). Use NPCModelManifest.ts selection logic: genre (fantasy/scifi/modern/generic) + gender + body type (average/athletic/heavy/slim) + role (guard/merchant/civilian). Attach parts as child nodes to Skeleton3D bone hierarchy. Fallback chain: role-specific -> body type -> genre+gender -> generic.

tasks.title: NPCAccessorySystem for visual variety
tasks.description: Implement npc_accessory_system.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/NPCAccessorySystem.ts and NPCAppearanceGenerator.ts. Attach accessories (hats, glasses, jewelry, weapons, tools) to NPC Skeleton3D at BoneAttachment3D nodes. Generate appearance variations deterministically from character seed using a seeded RandomNumberGenerator so each NPC looks unique. Accessories should match the NPC's occupation and social status. Use prop GLTF models from bundled assets.

tasks.title: NPCAnimationController with AnimationTree
tasks.description: Implement npc_animation_controller.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/NPCAnimationController.ts and AnimationAssetManager.ts. Use AnimationTree with AnimationNodeStateMachine for states: idle, walk, run, talk, sit, work, eat, sleep, interact, combat. Use AnimationNodeBlendSpace1D for locomotion (idle->walk->run based on speed). Load AnimationLibrary from bundled collection. Support occupation-specific work animations (blacksmith hammering, merchant gesturing, guard patrolling). Use AnimationTree.set() for parameter-driven transitions.

tasks.title: NPCMovementController with NavigationAgent3D
tasks.description: Implement npc_movement_controller.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/NPCMovementController.ts, PathfindingSystem.ts, and NavigationSystem.ts. NPCs use CharacterBody3D with NavigationAgent3D for pathfinding. Bake NavigationRegion3D mesh after terrain and buildings are generated. Support patrol routes, wandering within radius (random point via NavigationServer3D.map_get_random_point), walking to specific buildings, and following roads. NavigationAgent3D.avoidance_enabled handles NPC-NPC and NPC-player avoidance. Movement speed varies by activity. Integrate with npc_location_cycler for location cycling.

tasks.title: NPCScheduleSystem with daily routines
tasks.description: Implement npc_schedule_system.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/NPCScheduleSystem.ts, ScheduleExecutor.ts, and OccupationActivitySystem.ts. Each NPC follows a daily schedule from NPCIR.schedule (wake/sleep times, work hours, eating, socializing). NPCs set NavigationAgent3D target to home, workplace, tavern, town square based on game time. Sync with day_night_cycle. NPCs trigger appropriate animations at each location — sit animation at tables, work animation at stations, sleep animation in beds. Use a Timer or _process with game_time_manager checks.

tasks.title: NPCSimulationLOD for performance scaling
tasks.description: Implement npc_simulation_lod.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/NPCSimulationLOD.ts. Scale NPC simulation detail based on distance from player: nearby NPCs get full animation/pathfinding/interaction (process_mode=ALWAYS), mid-range NPCs get simplified movement (reduced _process frequency via frame counter), distant NPCs are hidden (visible=false, process_mode=DISABLED). Limit to MAX_NPCS (8) fully-simulated NPCs at once. Critical for Godot performance with many NPCs.

tasks.title: NPCGreetingSystem and interaction prompts
tasks.description: Implement npc_greeting_system.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/NPCGreetingSystem.ts, NPCInteractionPrompt.ts, and InteractionPromptSystem.ts. When the player enters NPC's Area3D detection zone, show a Control interaction prompt ('E to talk') via CanvasLayer. NPCs greet the player with contextual lines based on relationship, time of day, and current activity displayed in a Label3D speech bubble. Display NPC name and occupation as Label3D above their head. Use npc_talking_indicator for speech bubble Sprite3D when NPC is speaking.

tasks.title: NPCActivityLabelSystem and talking indicators
tasks.description: Implement npc_activity_label_system.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/NPCActivityLabelSystem.ts and NPCTalkingIndicator.ts. Show Label3D nodes above NPCs indicating their current activity (Working, Eating, Socializing, Resting, Shopping). Display Sprite3D speech bubble indicator when NPC is in conversation. Labels use look_at(camera.global_position) for billboard effect and modulate.a fade with distance. Style Label3D with outline for readability.

tasks.title: AmbientConversationSystem for NPC-NPC chat
tasks.description: Implement ambient_conversation_system.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/AmbientConversationSystem.ts and NPCAmbientConversationManager.ts. When two NPCs are within proximity (Area3D overlap), they engage in ambient conversations with Label3D speech bubbles cycling through dialogue lines on a Timer. Use npc_socialization_controller logic for choosing conversation partners based on relationships and personality compatibility. Conversations emit signals that affect NPC relationships via relationship_manager.

tasks.title: Chat panel — dialogue UI with LLM integration
tasks.description: Implement dialogue UI as CanvasLayer scene matching shared/game-engine/rendering/BabylonChatPanel.ts. Full chat panel with: LineEdit for player messages, ScrollContainer with VBoxContainer for conversation history (RichTextLabel chat bubbles), TextureRect NPC portrait + Label name display, AnimatedSprite2D typing indicator while waiting for LLM response. Support dialogue action Buttons (Ask about quest, Trade, Request help, Say goodbye) matching BabylonDialogueActions.ts. Panel uses AnimationPlayer for slide-in. Handle multi-turn conversations with Array history.

tasks.title: LLM dialogue integration via AI service
tasks.description: Implement ai_service.gd matching the in-app game's LLM conversation system (shared/game-engine/logic/LocalNpcConversation.ts). Send player messages to configured AI endpoint (Gemini API, local Ollama, or custom) via HTTPRequest node. Include NPC system prompt from dialogueContexts in SystemsIR (personality, occupation, knowledge, relationship with player, current truths) in the request body. Parse streaming/chunked responses for real-time text display in chat panel. Support conversation memory as Array of {role, content} dicts across multiple interactions. Handle API key configuration via ConfigFile at user://settings.cfg.

tasks.title: LipSyncController for NPC speech
tasks.description: Implement lip_sync_controller.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/LipSyncController.ts. Animate NPC MeshInstance3D blend shapes (get_blend_shape_value/set_blend_shape_value) for mouth movement in sync with dialogue text display speed. Support streaming_audio_player integration for TTS AudioStreamPlayer3D playback if available. Even without TTS, NPCs should have mouth movement animation timed to their dialogue text scrolling using a Timer-driven blend shape oscillation.

tasks.title: NPCBusinessInteractionSystem for shops and services
tasks.description: Implement npc_business_interaction_system.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/NPCBusinessInteractionSystem.ts and BabylonShopPanel.ts. When interacting with merchant NPCs, open a shop CanvasLayer UI showing their inventory as GridContainer of TextureButton items with buy/sell Label prices. Support business types from BusinessIR: blacksmith, tavern, market, general store. Each business has appropriate items based on type. Include notice_board_panel (BabylonNoticeBoardPanel.ts equivalent) as a CanvasLayer for settlement notice boards with quests and announcements.

tasks.title: GameMenuSystem with all panels
tasks.description: Implement game_menu.gd as CanvasLayer matching shared/game-engine/rendering/GameMenuSystem.ts. Pause menu with TabContainer or custom tab Buttons for: Resume, Inventory, Quest Journal, Map, Skills, Rules, Settings, Save/Load, Quit. Input.is_action_just_pressed('ui_cancel') toggles menu and sets get_tree().paused = true. Each tab shows/hides corresponding PanelContainer child. Match UIIR configuration for which panels are enabled. Include genre_ui_manager logic to show/hide genre-specific panels.

tasks.title: Inventory system with equipment
tasks.description: Implement inventory_ui.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/BabylonInventory.ts and logic/EquipmentManager.ts. Grid-based inventory using GridContainer of TextureRect slots with item icons, Label stack counts, tooltip PanelContainer on mouse_entered showing item description. Support item categories: weapons, armor, consumables, quest items, books, crafting materials as filter TabBar. Drag-and-drop using _get_drag_data/_can_drop_data/_drop_data for equipping. Equipment slots displayed on character paper doll TextureRect. Use SubViewport rendering of 3D item model for preview icons matching ItemThumbnailRenderer.ts.

tasks.title: Quest tracking and journal UI
tasks.description: Implement quest UI matching shared/game-engine/rendering/BabylonQuestTracker.ts and QuestOfferPanel.ts. HUD quest tracker: always-visible PanelContainer listing active quest objectives with CheckBox progress indicators. Quest journal panel: ScrollContainer with ItemList of all quests (active/completed/failed) with RichTextLabel descriptions. Quest offer popup PanelContainer when NPC offers a quest with Accept/Decline Buttons. Integrate with quest_indicator_manager for Sprite3D quest markers (!) above NPC heads and quest_waypoint_manager for 3D arrow pointing toward objectives.

tasks.title: QuestCompletionManager and notification system
tasks.description: Implement quest_completion_manager.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/QuestCompletionManager.ts, QuestNotificationManager.ts, and QuestNotificationSystem.ts. Detect quest objective completion, emit signals for completion events, award rewards (XP, items, reputation). Show notification toast Labels that AnimationPlayer slides in from screen edge for quest updates (new quest, objective complete, quest complete). Support quest_hotspot_manager using Area3D trigger zones. Integrate with logic equivalents of QuestCompletionEngine and QuestAutoCompletionDetector.

tasks.title: CombatSystem with multiple combat modes
tasks.description: Implement combat systems matching shared/game-engine/rendering/CombatSystem.ts, TurnBasedCombatSystem.ts, FightingCombatSystem.ts, and RangedCombatSystem.ts. Support genre-appropriate combat mode from CombatIR: real-time action (Area3D hitbox/hurtbox with body_entered signals), turn-based RPG (sequential action selection CanvasLayer UI), or ranged (RigidBody3D projectiles with CollisionShape3D). Include combat_ui HUD elements (ProgressBar health bars, action Buttons, TextureRect crosshair). Label3D or SubViewport world-space health bar for enemies. Combat uses CharacterIR stats.

tasks.title: ResourceSystem with gathering mechanics
tasks.description: Implement resource_system.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/ResourceSystem.ts and gathering sub-systems: logic/FishingSystem.ts, logic/MiningSystem.ts, logic/HerbalismSystem.ts. Player gathers resources from world Area3D objects (mine ore nodes, fish in water, pick herbs). Each system has its own mini-game CanvasLayer UI or interaction pattern (fishing: ProgressBar timing bar, mining: hold interaction with Timer, herbalism: proximity Area3D collection). Resources add to inventory and feed into crafting. Only enabled when ResourcesIR is present.

tasks.title: CraftingSystem and recipe UI
tasks.description: Implement crafting_system.gd matching shared/game-engine/logic/CraftingSystem.ts and logic/RecipeCraftingSystem.ts. Recipe-based crafting using gathered resources and purchased materials. Crafting CanvasLayer UI: left ItemList panel lists available recipes (filtered by owned materials), right PanelContainer shows required ingredients with have/need Label counts and TextureRect result preview. Support crafting stations at appropriate businesses (forge at blacksmith, kitchen at tavern) via Area3D proximity detection. Crafted items add to inventory.

tasks.title: ExplorationDiscoverySystem with rewards
tasks.description: Implement exploration_discovery_system.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/ExplorationDiscoverySystem.ts. Track which areas the player has visited using Area3D trigger zones per settlement/landmark that emit body_entered signals. Award discovery bonuses (XP, items) for finding new settlements, landmarks, hidden areas. Show discovery notification toast via AnimationPlayer. Integrate with knowledge_collection_system for collecting world lore entries into a codex PanelContainer. Support contextual_hint_system for Label3D hints guiding toward undiscovered content.

tasks.title: ReputationManager and relationship tracking
tasks.description: Implement reputation_manager.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/ReputationManager.ts, logic/RelationshipManager.ts, and logic/RomanceSystem.ts. Track player reputation per settlement and faction as Dictionary of float values. Track individual NPC relationships (friendship, trust, romance) with threshold checks for relationship level changes. Reputation affects shop prices (price multiplier), quest availability (gate by min rep), NPC dialogue tone (passed to ai_service context). Relationship changes based on dialogue choices, quest completion, and player actions. Emit signals on relationship changes.

tasks.title: AnimalNPCSystem with ambient wildlife
tasks.description: Implement animal_npc_system.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/AnimalNPCSystem.ts and logic/AmbientLifeBehaviorSystem.ts. Spawn animal CharacterBody3D nodes from IR animals data (cats, dogs, birds, horses) using bundled animal GLTF models. Animals use NavigationAgent3D for wandering with reduced update frequency. Wild animals flee from player (set target away from player position), pets follow (set target to player). Support vehicle_system for rideable animals (horses, alpacas) with mount/dismount interaction via Area3D. Animals add ambient life to settlements.

tasks.title: AudioManager with spatial and ambient audio
tasks.description: Implement audio_manager.gd as Autoload matching shared/game-engine/rendering/AudioManager.ts, EnvironmentalAudioManager.ts, and logic/AmbientSoundSystem.ts. Play ambient AudioStreamPlayer (looping) per worldType from audio manifest. Spatial AudioStreamPlayer3D on NPCs for conversation audio, animals for sounds, water bodies for ambient loops. Footstep AudioStreamPlayer on player that switches AudioStream based on RayCast3D surface detection (stone, grass, wood, metal). Door sound on building entry/exit. Support streaming_audio_player for TTS via HTTPRequest + AudioStreamGenerator.

tasks.title: PhotographySystem — screenshot capture
tasks.description: Implement photography_system.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/BabylonPhotographySystem.ts and BabylonPhotoBookPanel.ts. Photo mode: set get_tree().paused = true, switch to free Camera3D, apply Environment post-processing (vignette, color correction), capture via get_viewport().get_texture().get_image(). Photo book CanvasLayer panel: GridContainer of TextureRect thumbnails to review captured screenshots. Save photos to user://photos/ using Image.save_png(). Key exploration feature.

tasks.title: PuzzleSystem and dungeon generation
tasks.description: Implement puzzle_system.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/PuzzleSystem.ts, BabylonPuzzleUI.ts, and ProceduralDungeonGenerator.ts. Generate dungeons from IR dungeon data: create room Node3D scenes connected by corridor meshes (CSGBox3D or ArrayMesh), spawn enemy NPCs and loot containers per room spec. Puzzles appear as Area3D-interactable objects with their own CanvasLayer overlay UI. Support multiple puzzle types (pattern matching, sequence). Dungeon generation uses seeded RandomNumberGenerator for deterministic layouts.

tasks.title: GameIntroSequence and narrative cutscenes
tasks.description: Implement game_intro_sequence.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/GameIntroSequence.ts and NarrativeCutscenePanel.ts. Play intro sequence when starting new game: fullscreen CanvasLayer overlay with RichTextLabel for NarrativeIR text (BBCode for formatting), TextureRect character portraits, TextureRect background art, AudioStreamPlayer narration. Support mid-game narrative cutscenes triggered by quest signals. Use Tween for text fade/slide transitions. Include main_menu_screen.gd equivalent: main menu scene (SceneTree.change_scene_to_file) with New Game, Continue, Settings, Quit Buttons.

tasks.title: OnboardingManager and tutorial system
tasks.description: Implement onboarding_manager.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/OnboardingLauncher.ts and logic/OnboardingManager.ts. Step-by-step tutorial guiding the player through basic controls (movement, camera, interaction, inventory, dialogue, combat). Highlight UI elements with ColorRect overlay + TextureRect arrow pointer positioned via Control anchors. Tutorial steps from shared/onboarding/ definitions. Support tutorial_quest_system for tutorial quests that teach game mechanics through guided objectives with Area3D triggers.

tasks.title: ActionQuickBar and player action system
tasks.description: Implement action_quick_bar.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/ActionQuickBar.ts, BabylonRadialMenu.ts, and logic/PlayerActionTracker.ts. HUD hotbar: HBoxContainer with 9 TextureRect action slots bound to number key InputMap actions, showing item/ability icons. Radial menu: circular Control that appears on middle mouse hold using polar coordinates for button placement. Track player actions for quest completion detection. Support player_action_system for executing actions (use item, cast spell, interact). Include world_object_action_manager for context-sensitive Area3D object interactions.

tasks.title: RuleEnforcer and truth sync
tasks.description: Implement rule_enforcer.gd matching shared/game-engine/rendering/RuleEnforcer.ts and logic/GameTruthSync.ts. Evaluate world rules from SystemsIR.rules against current game state stored as Dictionary. Rules gate content (show/hide nodes), trigger events (emit signals), and modify NPC behavior. Sync truths (world facts as Dictionary) as they change from player actions and quest progress. Support content_gating_manager for locking/unlocking content based on rule evaluation results. Include temporary_state_system for time-limited status effects that auto-expire via Timer nodes.

tasks.title: Save/Load system with multiple playthroughs
tasks.description: Implement save_system.gd as Autoload matching shared/game-engine/rendering/SaveIndicator.ts and logic/RunManager.ts. Auto-save at configurable intervals via Timer with TextureRect spinning indicator. Manual save/load from game menu with slot selection HBoxContainer. Serialize game state to JSON via JSON.stringify(): player position, inventory, quest progress, NPC relationships, reputation, discovered areas, game time. Save to user://saves/ using FileAccess. Support save_conflict_resolver for handling save conflicts. Playthrough management for multiple save slots with world preview Label/TextureRect.

tasks.title: SkillTreePanel and document reading
tasks.description: Implement skill tree and document CanvasLayer panels matching shared/game-engine/rendering/BabylonSkillTreePanel.ts, DocumentReadingPanel.ts, and BabylonRulesPanel.ts. Skill tree panel: GraphEdit or custom Control with skill TextureButton nodes connected by Line2D, click to unlock with skill points. Document reading panel: opens when player interacts with books/scrolls, showing TextIR content with RichTextLabel and previous/next page Buttons. Rules panel: ScrollContainer with ItemList of active world rules affecting gameplay. Support composition_writing_ui with TextEdit for player text composition.

tasks.title: VR support scaffolding via XR
tasks.description: Implement VR scaffolding matching the in-app game's VR systems: VRManager.ts, VRHandTrackingManager.ts, VRInteractionManager.ts, VRHUDManager.ts, VRChatPanel.ts, VRCombatAdapter.ts, VRUIPanel.ts, VRVocabularyLabels.ts, VRAccessibilityManager.ts, and logic/VRComfortSettings.ts. Use Godot's XROrigin3D + XRCamera3D + XRController3D nodes with OpenXR. Create XR rig with hand tracking (XRHandTracker), teleport locomotion (RayCast3D + visual arc), VR-adapted UI as SubViewport on MeshInstance3D panels in world space. Accessibility: vignette shader, snap turn via stick input, seated mode toggle.
